steps.title: Spot the passage's approach to a solution
steps.content: The passage doesn't offer potential solutions—it describes actual, implemented restoration with immediate results (“ecological restoration strategies were employed,” “The rebound effect...was noticed almost immediately”).

steps.title: Match the passage's two-part structure
steps.content:
Choice B describes exactly what the passage does: it mentions the elimination and then provides the reason for restoration (scientists recognized the wolf was essential).

The other choices either identify structures not present in the passage or mischaracterize the passage's actual progression.
This matches choice B — B is correct.
